author: Shikhar
name: PR1851 graph + 9-hparam stack + wd_strong + GPTQ AR + pergroup compression
blurb: PR #1851-derived BOS-fixed SmearGate + LQER asymmetric + SparseAttnGate/PolarNS/FusedCE stack with PR #1855's 9 hparam overrides, a stronger Muon weight-decay schedule, GPTQ all-rank Hessian averaging, and PR #1855-style per-group lrzip+brotli compression ported into the PR #1851 graph. Seed 42 reaches 1.05956571 BPB with a 15,901,624 byte artifact.
technique_summary: PR #1851 graph with PR #1855's 9 hparams, wd_strong Muon weight-decay schedule (0.5 low / 1.75 high), GPTQ all-rank Hessian averaging, and PR #1855 per-group lrzip+brotli compression ported into train_gpt.py.
